title: Trust, Greed, Bullets & Bourbon
overview: A group of thieves reunite five years after a failed heist to determine what went wrong and who is to blame as they attempt to recover the missing loot. Starring: Max Casella (The Sopranos, Blue Jasmine, Inside Llewyn Davis) and 4x Tony-nominated actor Danny Burstein (Boardwalk Empire).
